name: humanly
description: Text provenance service for tracking typing activities in external forms and surveys
_vercelBuildCommand: For frontend-user deployment on Vercel, use: pnpm build:vercel-frontend-user

scripts.build:all: pnpm build:tracker && pnpm build:backend && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:frontend-user
scripts.build:vercel-frontend: pnpm clean:ts-artifacts && pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:frontend
scripts.build:vercel-frontend-user: pnpm clean:ts-artifacts && pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:editor && pnpm build:frontend-user
scripts.clean:ts-artifacts: rm -rf packages/shared/dist packages/editor/dist packages/shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/editor/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/frontend-user/.next
